payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical dark handles, reflective/smudged surface and minor dents; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away) and shown mostly full-height and centered in the crop.

message.content: {"label":"refrigerator","short_description":"stainless-steel double-door fridge center","long_description":"Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical dark handles, reflective/smudged surface and minor dents; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away) and shown mostly full-height and centered in the crop.","attributes":["stainless steel finish","side-by-side double doors","vertical dark handles","reflective surface","visible smudges/fingerprints","minor dents/warping","centered in crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
